name: Many-to-Many with Bridge Table
description: Model a many-to-many relationship between customers and loyalty programs using a bridge table

checks.name: bridge_customer_program has 5 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM bridge_customer_program;

checks.name: Alice belongs to 2 programs
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM bridge_customer_program WHERE customer_id = 1;
checks.description: Alice (customer_id=1) is in Gold and Platinum programs

checks.name: Gold program has 2 members
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM bridge_customer_program WHERE program_id = 10;
checks.description: Gold program (program_id=10) has Alice and Carol
